title: Chopper's Delight (Polymer port)
body:
# Polymer Port of Chopper's Delight

This is a polymer port of [Chopper's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/choppers-delight), making it work fully server side, with all of its functionality intact.

This mod requires server resource pack, about which setup you can read here: https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/

You can read more about [Chopper's Delight on it's Modrinth page!](https://modrinth.com/mod/choppers-delight)

IN THIS PORT ADDED CUTTING BOARDS FROM BORUKVA FOOD AND BORUKVA FOOD EXOTIC TREES.
